name: TSH Corporation Limited
summary: TSH Corporation Limited, an investment holding company, operates a chain of pubs and bars. The company operates whiskey, cocktail, and caf√É¬© bars under the Quaich Bar, The Other Room, The Other Roof, and Copper names. It also imports, exports, and distributes spirits, wines, and liquors. TSH Corporation Limited was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Singapore.
